query: The Eiffel Tower is located in the capital of which country?

Title: Paris

Role: distractor

[Segment 3]
Title: Madrid
Role: distractor
Madrid is the capital city of Spain.

[Segment 4]
Title: Eiffel Tower
Role: gold-evidence
The Eiffel Tower is located in Paris.

query: The author of 1984 was born in which country?

context.context_text:
[Segment 1]
Title: Animal Farm
Role: distractor
Animal Farm is another novel by George Orwell.

[Segment 2]
Title: United Kingdom
Role: distractor
George Orwell later worked in England.

[Segment 3]
Title: 1984
Role: gold-evidence
1984 is a novel written by George Orwell.

[Segment 4]
Title: George Orwell
Role: gold-evidence
George Orwell was born in Motihari, British India.
